title: Glorious Springy Turkish Lamb Kebab Doner
description: A traditional Turkish dish featuring lamb, cherry tomatoes, and a salt-bake, halal-friendly and full of umami flavor, this kebab-doner is a nostalgic treat for the senses.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the sliced lamb to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the lamb to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the cherry tomatoes by tossing them with a pinch of salt and a drizzle of olive oil.
Once the lamb is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Serve the lamb in a kebab-doner format, topped with cherry tomatoes, red onion, and garlic.
Drizzle with additional olive oil and serve immediately.
